message:
refactor: deduplicate protobuf parsing, fix dead code, consolidate types (-160 lines)

- Zig: string_column.zig and vector_column.zig now use column_meta.zig's
  shared getColumnOffsetEntry() and getPageBufferInfo() instead of duplicates
- Zig: fix readVarint inconsistency — format.zig now uses saturating +|= 7
  matching column_meta.zig (prevents overflow on malformed varint input)
- TS: remove duplicate FragmentInfo/ManifestInfo from manifest.ts, re-export
  from types.ts (single source of truth)
- TS: add optional append() and executeStream() to QueryExecutor interface,
  removing unsafe casts in TableQuery
- TS: remove dead float32 fallthrough code in registerColumn (fixed_size_list
  is already handled by its own case branch)
